name: Information Technology Infrastructure Library
description: ITIL — service management framework. ITIL 4 is the current major version. Widely used for IT service management; intersects security in service operation and information security management.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted systems within scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.
